risks.title: Dutch referee dies aged 38 weeks after being dropped from World Cup
risks.description:
Dutch football referee Rob Dieperink has died at the age of 38, just weeks after he was removed from FIFA's list of match officials for the 2026 World Cup following a police investigation in the United Kingdom that was later dropped.
